---
title: "Facial cosmetics have little effect on attractiveness judgments compared with identity"
authors: "Jones, A. L., & Kramer, R."
year: 2015
date: 2015-01-01
pub-journal: "Perception"
volume: "44(1)"
pages: "79–86"
doi: "10.1068/p7904"
pdf: "assets/papers/2015/jones_kramer_2015.pdf"
categories: [cosmetics, attractiveness]
---
